g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the single responsibility principle and how does it apply here?')
sendPrompt('How should input validation be extracted from this function?')
sendPrompt('How should data filtering be extracted from this function?')
sendPrompt('How should metric aggregation be extracted from this function?')
sendPrompt('What does building the report data structure involve?')
sendPrompt('How should chart data preparation be separated?')
sendPrompt('What is the output rendering responsibility?')
sendPrompt('Show me a refactored version of the validation logic')
sendPrompt('Show me a refactored version of the filtering logic')
sendPrompt('Show me a refactored version of the aggregation logic')
sendPrompt('Show me a refactored version of the report builder')
sendPrompt('Show me a refactored version of the chart data logic')
sendPrompt('Show me a refactored version of the render dispatch')
